title: Computer Architecture and Memory System
summary: Introduces the von Neumann computer model, ISA vs. machine organisation, the main hardware components and system buses, ROM/RAM technologies, memory addressing (byte order, decoding), the memory hierarchy, and cache memory in depth: performance, direct/fully-associative/set-associative construction, and write policies.
key_concepts: direct mapped / fully associative / set associative
learning_objectives: Describe the von Neumann computer model
List ROM and RAM technologies and their properties
Explain big-endian and little-endian byte ordering
